channel.title: SPCX Watch — Musk-Free Certified
channel.description: Daily-scanned changes in Tesla/SpaceX exposure across 843 funds. Know the moment SPCX lands in yours.

item.title: XLY: exposure shift
item.description: XLY (Consumer Discretionary Select Sector SPDR) Musk exposure moved 18.6% → 18.1%.

item.title: VCIT: SpaceX detected
item.description: VCIT (Vanguard Intermediate-Term Corporate Bond ETF) now shows SpaceX at 0.27% — SPCX has entered this fund's visible holdings.

item.title: LCAP: exposure shift
item.description: LCAP (Principal Capital Appreciation Select ETF) Musk exposure moved 1.5% → 0.0%.

item.title: TSLL: exposure shift
item.description: TSLL (Direxion Daily TSLA Bull 2X Shares) Musk exposure moved 17.4% → 6.3%.

item.title: LCAP: exposure shift
item.description: LCAP (Principal Capital Appreciation Select ETF) Musk exposure moved 0.0% → 1.5%.

item.title: XOVR: exposure shift
item.description: XOVR (ERShares Private-Public Crossover ETF) Musk exposure moved 16.0% → 14.9%.

item.title: VOX: SpaceX detected
item.description: VOX (Vanguard Communication Services ETF) now shows SpaceX at 2.37% — SPCX has entered this fund's visible holdings.

item.title: QQQ: SpaceX detected
item.description: QQQ (Invesco QQQ Trust (Nasdaq-100)) now shows SpaceX at 1.21% — SPCX has entered this fund's visible holdings.

item.title: QQQM: SpaceX detected
item.description: QQQM (Invesco Nasdaq-100 ETF) now shows SpaceX at 1.25% — SPCX has entered this fund's visible holdings.

item.title: ARKQ: exposure shift
item.description: ARKQ (ARK Autonomous Tech & Robotics ETF) Musk exposure moved 16.2% → 16.8%.

item.title: XLY: exposure shift
